title: FNA 目的 / Purpose of FNA
point: 充分了解客户,为适当推荐建立合理基础;须书面。 / Understand the client to establish a reasonable basis; document it.
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Fact Finding and Needs Analysis

title: 信息不足 / Insufficient info
point: 客户拒答关键信息→记录影响,不做缺乏合理基础的推荐。 / If the client declines, document impact; no unfounded advice.
keyfacts: 不贸然推荐 / No premature advice
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Fact Finding and Needs Analysis
